message:
fix: revert leaderboard to all-time scoring, add kubestellar/kubestellar to UI repo list (#1521)

PR #1503 scoped leaderboard to current calendar year, causing
contributor point totals to appear dramatically lower than expected —
contributors with years of history showed only 4 months of 2026
activity, making the leaderboard look broken.

Revert to all-time scoring so historical contributions are reflected.
Also update the subtitle to say "All-time contributions" (was "Tracking
2026 contributions") and add the kubestellar/kubestellar repo link to
match the repos now tracked by the script since #1519.

Fixes #1520

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
